{{Quote|Your hospitality is as welcome as the prospect of refreshment.|[[Tenel Ka Djo|Beknit]], to Shanko|<ref name="Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy">''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]''</ref>}}
'''Shanko''' was the [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] owner and [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] of [[Shanko's Hive]], a drinking establishment located on the inner floor of [[Borgo Prime/Legends|Borgo Prime]]. He was a capable bartender and could stay focused on his job despite the constant chaos that erupted inside the walls of Shanko's Hive. Though the majority of his customers were disreputable, he took great pride in the fact that they attracted many more paying customers who were seeking them out. He stood three meters tall, had antennae, multifaceted eyes covered with a nictating membrane, and at least three pairs of multi-jointed arms.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]''
